task_completion.description: Log into the SEB Server as super-admin
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the SEB Server interface at http://localhost:8080, indicating a successful login (e.g., dashboard visible, user profile showing 'super-admin').

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Institutions management section
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SEB Server interface displaying the 'Institutions' list or management page.
The text 'Pacific Northwest Health Sciences Testing Center' entered into the Name field of the new institution form.
The text 'pnhstc' entered into the URL Suffix field of the new institution form.
An 'Active' checkbox, toggle, or dropdown set to true/enabled for the new institution.

task_completion.description: Save and verify the institution creation
task_completion.visual_evidence: The newly created institution 'Pacific Northwest Health Sciences Testing Center' appearing in the saved list of institutions with the correct URL suffix and an active status.

integrity.description: Agent used a web browser to interact with the SEB Server GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: A standard web browser (like Chrome or Firefox) is open and navigating the SEB Server web interface.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing curl, wget, or API requests used to create the institution programmatically.

integrity.description: Agent did not directly manipulate the database
integrity.visual_evidence: No database management tools (e.g., DBeaver, sqlite3, psql) or scripts are visible being used to insert the institution record directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected institution name is exactly 'Pacific Northwest Health Sciences Testing Center'. The expected URL suffix is exactly 'pnhstc'. The institution must be explicitly marked as active.
